calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-21-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for short cause trial/Prove Up Hearing. Dept. 514, Judge: Rebecca Wiseman, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Joseph A. Lepera, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Gregoria Labrado.
Witness Gregoria Labrado and Angelica Labrado sworn and examined.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant Peter Daniel Labrado.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Rental Agreement is canceled.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1237 Naples Street, San Francisco, California 94112.

Damages $0 - Possession Only
Holdover damages $0
Pre-judgment interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $0
for a Total Judgment of $0 - Possession Only

Court modified Judgment to exclude Plaintiff Gregoria Labrado, owner, as an occupant of the premises.
Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Mar-21-2016 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-17-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: JPT: Greg Call; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Gregoria Labrado is present.
Attorney Joseph Lepera for the plaintiff.
Defendant Peter Labrado is present.
Attorney Misti Schmidt appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of MAR-21-2016 remains on calendar. (JPT/501)
